title: Iterators, Generators, and Lazy Pipelines · Language Clinic: Python Iterable Iterator
summary: Stream large activity exports through bounded-memory validation and aggregation stages. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python iterable iterator increment in a lazy activity-processing pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish iterable, iterator, iter, next, StopIteration, restartability, and one-pass consumption.
Build a command-line interface with argparse subcommands, validated options, useful help, standard streams, and exit codes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
